error_signature: The service refused the connection - perhaps it is offline
title: Website tool connection refused error
symptom: When the Docker container for the website is stopped, the AI Agent encounters an error stating 'The service refused the connection - perhaps it is offline'. This causes the workflow to stop executing.
applies_when: Docker container for the website is stopped
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different node
root_cause: The error occurs because the AI Agent attempts to connect to a website that is not currently running. When the Docker container is stopped, the HTTP request made by the Website tool fails, leading to a connection refusal error.
fix_steps: Downgrade the AI Agent node to version 2.2
Test the workflow again to see if the error persists
agent_instruction: Downgrade the AI Agent node to version 2.2 and re-test the workflow.
